arts.ttl: Antonin Kinsky reveals 'intense' Daniel Levy negotiations and key reason behind Tottenham transfer
arts.sum: However, Kinsky's agent, Viktor Kolar, has revealed how negotiations between both clubs were tough, as both Daniel Levy and Slavia's chairman Jaroslav Tvrdik initially refused to budge on their preferred terms. "We even got into a situation where Mr Tvrdik (Slavia’s Chairman) said, 'I want to do it' but he was not willing to give in, on the other side was Daniel Levy, who said he was also interested in doing it and completing the transfer but he was not willing to give in either and so it turned out that sometimes even those personal meetings really break the ice and those people can find consensus better.

arts.ttl: Tottenham team vs Liverpool confirmed as Antonin Kinsky starts with Yang Min-hyeok on the bench
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has thrown new signing Antonin Kinsky straight in for his debut in goal as Tottenham welcome Liverpool in the Carabao Cup semi-final first leg on Wednesday night. Spurs made their first signing of the January transfer window with the arrival of 21-year-old Kinsky from Slavia Prague in a deal that could be worth around £12.5million with add-ons.

arts.ttl: Is Tottenham vs Liverpool on ITV? Carabao Cup semi-final TV details explained
arts.sum: The first leg of Arsenal v Newcastle and the second leg of Liverpool v Tottenham Hotspur will also be broadcast on ITV1 and ITVX as part of a collaboration to give all UK football fans the chance to watch free-to-air coverage of select Carabao Cup and EFL fixtures." Instead of being free to air, all four semi-final games, including Wednesday night’s first leg, are being shown live on Sky Sports

arts.ttl: Rodrigo Bentancur is taken off on a stretcher just minutes into Tottenham's Carabao Cup semi-final against Liverpool... as Ange Postecoglou's injury crisis worsens
arts.sum: The midfielder, who has just returned from a ban, started in midfield for the clash, though his night lasted just a matter of minutes before he hit the desk in concerning scenes.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Spurs host Liverpool in Carabao Cup semfinal first leg
arts.sum: All the latest from the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. ESPN has updates

arts.ttl: 'We have no defenders!' | Spurs mascots send hilarious message to Van Dijk!
arts.sum: The Tottenham mascots had a very clear message to Virgil van Dijk ahead of the Carabao Cup semi-final clash!

arts.ttl: Liverpool name strong team for Tottenham with Trent Alexander-Arnold and one more key man benched
arts.sum: Arne Slot has named Liverpool's XI for the clash with Tottenham Hotspur in the League Cup on Tuesday

arts.ttl: 'What we do know is' - Liverpool handed new Trent Alexander-Arnold contract verdict
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold is out of contract at the end of the season and has been the subject of an approach from Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes Trent Alexander-Arnold decision for Liverpool's clash with Tottenham
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold endured an awful game against Manchester United on Sunday and boss Arne Slot has now dropped him for the Carabao Cup clash with Tottenham

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold is DROPPED by Liverpool for Carabao Cup semi-final at Tottenham after Man United horror show as Real Madrid try to sign him
arts.sum: The England right-back, who has been left out for 21-year-old starlet Conor Bradley, put in one of his worst performances in a Liverpool shirt on Sunday as his side drew 2-2 with bitter rivals Man United.
